title: Balanced Support
subtitle: Sustaining energy with care
description: As physical demands increase, you may feel more tired than before. Focusing on balanced portions, steady hydration, and consistent meals can help support your energy and overall comfort.
what_to_expect: Greater importance of balanced meal portions
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or overeating in one sitting
hydration: Drink water frequently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Balanced meals and steady hydration help support your energy and comfort.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced portions and regular meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Eat controlled portions at regular intervals
Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced portions support steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Regular intake of iron-rich foods supports energy and helps manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nourishment supports your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and hydration support metabolic balance and energy.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, balanced portions, regular meals, and proper hydration help maintain stability and energy.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment and hydration support your overall well-being.
